summary: Frontend testing for MIRA AI Pet Companion OS - UI features verification completed with code review. Pet photo, Soul Card, InlineConciergeCard, and text formatting implementations verified correct in code. Automated UI testing limited due to page memory crashes on /mira-demo (4000+ lines).

issues: Page is very large (4000+ lines) causing browser crashes during automated testing. Consider lazy loading more components or code splitting.

login_flow.details: Login with dipali@clubconcierge.in/test123 works correctly, redirects to /dashboard

mira_demo_page.details: Page loads but causes browser crashes during extended testing due to large size

pet_photo_in_welcome_hero.details: Avatar photo element exists at .avatar-photo img, uses pet.photo prop. Placeholder shown for pets without photos (like Lola). Mystique has photo_url in DB.

soul_score_badge_and_ticker.details: Soul Knowledge Ticker visible at top with SOUL% badge. Clicking badge opens expanded panel showing pet photo with score overlay.

inline_concierge_card.details: Component shows 'Pet Concierge®' in pink (#F472B6) color. Has WhatsApp, Chat, Email buttons with data-testid attributes. Triggered by shouldShowConciergeCard() function checking for concierge-related patterns in Mira response.

text_formatting.details: FormattedText component uses ReactMarkdown with custom renderers. Bold text styled with #F472B6 (pink) color. Lists (ul/ol) properly styled. Links open in new tab.

InlineConciergeCard_jsx.pink_color_styling: Lines 64, 75, 127: #F472B6 color applied to header, icon background, and description text
InlineConciergeCard_jsx.data_testids: Lines 35, 91, 148, 178, 209: All buttons have proper data-testid attributes

ChatMessage_jsx.bold_styling: Lines 93-100: strong elements get #F472B6 color with text-shadow
ChatMessage_jsx.card_rendering: Lines 1064, 1083-1089: Shows InlineConciergeCard when concierge mentioned

WelcomeHero_jsx.pet_photo: Lines 135-148: avatar-photo div with img element using pet.photo src

SoulKnowledgeTicker_jsx.score_overlay: Lines 273-295: Pet photo with score overlay in expanded panel

MiraDemoPage_jsx.pet_photo_transform: Lines 919-920: photo constructed from p.photo_url with API_URL prefix

action_items: Consider code splitting or lazy loading more components in MiraDemoPage.jsx to reduce memory usage during testing
Pet 'Lola' shows placeholder because photo_url is null - this is expected behavior, not a bug
To verify InlineConciergeCard visually, manually send a message like 'connect me with concierge' in chat
critical_code_review_comments: InlineConciergeCard correctly implements 'Pet Concierge®' text with #F472B6 pink color styling
FormattedText component properly renders bold text in pink (#F472B6) and lists using ReactMarkdown
shouldShowConciergeCard() has comprehensive pattern matching for concierge-related responses
Pet photo is passed correctly from API (photo_url) through MiraDemoPage -> SoulKnowledgeTicker/WelcomeHero
Score overlay in expanded Soul panel correctly shows pet photo with score when petPhoto prop is available

success_rate.frontend: 80% (code verification complete, automated UI testing limited by page crashes)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The /mira-demo page is very resource-intensive (4000+ lines) and causes browser crashes during extended Playwright testing. Use mobile viewport and minimal waits. To test InlineConciergeCard, switch to a pet with a photo (Mystique, Luna, or Meister) and send a message mentioning 'concierge'. The first active pet (Lola) has no photo, so placeholder shows correctly.
